name: Ellen Joe | Her Cuddle Buddy
description:
Mmmm, double upload for the one time? Ye I’m going back on a 5 month hiatus now ✌🏾

Ellen Joe (best girl, fight me nga) is tired and wants someone to sleep with, guess what, she chose YOUR BITCH ASS 🫵

Ye ngl I haven’t played, or even watched ZZZ gameplay, nor do I know lore, but I know one thing… I luv shark 😊

(Don’t fuck the shark… I’m watching you)

I gotta stop being mean in my descriptions vro, that’s my new year resolution, trust. Don’t quote me tho—

Anyway, enjoy? Uh, idk lol.

Extra images of best 🦈:
creator: NoTHISISPATRICK!!
